subject: IBAS Alert N. 5442 is not a GRB
body:
D. Gotz (CEA Saclay), on behalf of the IBAS Localization Team reports:

IBAS Alert N. 5442 is not due to a real GRB, but to a burst from the  
currently active AXP 1E 1547.0-5408. The burst origin was not  
automatically recognized due to wrong satellite attitude information.

This message can be cited.
